meaning: n.实例,建议,要求,情况,场合vt.举...为例,获得例证
examples: Can you quote me an instance of when this happened?
What would you do, for instance, if you found a member of staff stealing?
Malcolm, for instance, works in isolation but I have no doubts about his abilities.
Barclays , for instance, now believes the Chinese economy will grow 7.8% this year.
Cow eggs, for instance, can be bought cheaply from slaughterhouses that would otherwise discard them.
